post_code:
#define CARMINE_DISPLAY_MEM	(800 * 600 * 4)   // 1,920,000 per display
#define MAX_DISPLAY                2
#define CARMINE_TOTAL_DISPLAY_MEM_RAW (CARMINE_DISPLAY_MEM * MAX_DISPLAY)  // 3,840,000

// Round up to next power of two
#define ROUND_UP_TO_POWER_OF_2(x) \
    (1ULL << (64 - clz64((x) - 1)))

#define CARMINE_TOTAL_DISPLAY_MEM \
    ROUND_UP_TO_POWER_OF_2(CARMINE_TOTAL_DISPLAY_MEM_RAW)
modified_location: Ensure CARMINE_TOTAL_DISPLAY_MEM is a power of 2 by rounding up to the next power of 2.
